visual_description: The audio opens with a high-pitched, piercing, and suspenseful electronic tone that immediately creates a sense of tension and anticipation. A medium close-up shot focuses on a man in a dimly lit, blue-green environment. He wears a light-colored suit jacket with a floral pattern on the lapel. He has a serious, contemplative expression as he looks slightly off-camera. In the blurred background, other figures are visible, including a person in a red shirt and another wearing a patterned head covering. The camera is steady, keeping the man as the central point of focus. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. This is quickly joined by a deep, ominous, and resonant drone that builds in volume, evoking a feeling of a serious and clandestine meeting. The camera cuts to a close-up of a man in a dark suit and glasses, looking down with a focused and intense gaze. The lighting is low and moody, casting shadows across his face. The background is dark and indistinct. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The shot changes to a medium close-up of the same man from the previous shot, now looking down at a black briefcase
